results.title: Warri: Evacuate illegal occupiers from Olero Flow station,Chevron host communities tell Oborevwori
results.description: Leaders of Itsekiri Communities of Ebrohimi, Obaghoro, Tebu, Gbokoda, Aja – Amita, Udo and Jakpa, making up the Indigenous Communities of Olero Oil Field in Warri North Local Government Area, have called on Delta State Governor, Rt. Hon. Sheriff Oborevwori, to investigate violation of the peace accord reportedly signed by Itsekiri, Ijaw and Urhobo leaders, [...] The post Warri: Evacuate illegal occupiers from Olero Flow station,Chevron host communities tell Oborevwori appeared first on Vanguard News .

results.title: State must fund political parties to safeguard Ghana’s democracy
results.description: Some of the stakeholders who were present the at the event The Head of the Department of Political Science at the University of Ghana, Professor Isaac Owusu Mensah, has called for state funding of political parties. According to him, political parties remain the primary vehicles through which Ghanaians exercise their democratic right to change governments. [...] The post State must fund political parties to safeguard Ghana’s democracy appeared first on Ghanamma.com .
